verses.text: Topa in Moses kiangah
“Meivak khat a tawntungin a kivaksuak theihna dingin meivak-a dingin oliv gah a kisuzante panin sathau siangtho nang kiangah hong paipihna ding uh Israel mite thu pia in

Kikhopna buk sung, thuciamna singkuang dalna puan pualamah, Aaron in nitaka kipanin zingsang dongin Topa' mai-ah a tawntungin tua meivak a ngeina bangin koih ding a, tua pen na khang tawntungun ngeina khat hi tawntung ding hi
Amah in kham citak meivakkhuam tungah meivakte a ngeina bangin Topa' mai-ah omsak tawntung ding hi.
“Nangmah in annel la in la, tua panin moh sawmlenih bawlin em in; moh khat ciangin annel lawh nih hi ding hi
Nangmah in kham citak sabuai tungah tuate gual nihin na koih ding a, gual khatah guk om ding hi
Phawkna-in Topa' tungah mei tawh biakna-in piak dingin anlum tawh a paikhawm theihna dingin nangmah in a gual nihte-ah paknamtui siangtho na koih ding hi
Sabbath ni simin Aaron in a tawntung thuciamna-in Israel mite tangdingin Topa' mai-ah a ngeina bangin koih tawntung ding hi

Tua pen Topa' tungah mei tawh kihal biakna sung panin amah in a tawntunga a ngah ding, a siangtho pen ama kaih ahih manin, Aaron leh a suante-a' ding hi a, amaute in a siangtho mun khatah ne ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
Tu-in Israel numei khat' tapa, a pa Egypt mi ahi khat, Israel mite lakah a pai hi. Israel numei' tapa leh Israel mi khat giahphualah kitawng uh a
Israel numei' tapa in Min Siangtho gensia-in samsia hi. Amaute in Moses kiangah amah paipih uh hi. Ama nu' min pen Shelomith hi a, Dan minam, Dibri' tanu ahi hi
Topa' deihna amaute tungah a kigen mateng amaute in tua mipa khumcip uh hi
Topa in Moses kiangah
“A samsia mipa pen giahphual pualamah paipih in. Ama samsiat a za mi khempeuh ama lu tungah amau' khut ngasak in la, mihonte khempeuh amah denglumsak in
Tua ciangin Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Ama Pasian a samsia mi peuhmah in ama khialhna thuak ding hi
Topa' min a gensia mipa kithat ding hi. Mihonte khempeuh in amah denglum ding uh hi. Peemta hita leh tualsung mi hita leh, Min Siangtho a gensiate kithat ding hi
“Mi a thatpa kithat ding hi
Ganhing a thatpa in a ganhing mahin loh ding hi. A thu-in ci lehang nuntakna leh nuntakna a kithuk ding ahi hi
“Mi khat in a vengte khat a poisak leh, ama hih bangin ama tung mahah kithukkik ding a
guh kitan tangding guh kitan, mittang tangding mittang, ha tangding ha kihih ding a, amah in mi khat a poisak bangin amah kipoisak ding hi
Ganhing a thatpa in loh ding a, mi a thatpa kithat ding hi
Note in peemta leh tualsung mi-a' dingin ngeina a kibang khat na nei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Israel mite tungah hih thu a gen hi. Amaute in a samsia mipa giahphual pualamah paipih uh a, suang tawh a denglum uh hi. Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Israel mite in a hih uh hi.
